scope.summary: Sticker slice of rich-messages: render received/sent stickers as images, send & receive stickers end-to-end, and a sticker picker UI. zalo/ maps incoming chat.sticker messages and wraps send_sticker/search_sticker; session/ adds a throttled send_sticker; command/ adds send_sticker + search_stickers and persists sticker messages; the composer gets a sticker picker and the chat pane renders sticker bubbles.
goals: types/ StickerRef (carried on IncomingMessage) + StickerItem (picker) DTOs, no zca-rust dep
zalo/ maps incoming msgType=chat.sticker into a StickerRef; send_sticker + search_stickers + sticker_category wrap the zca-rust facade (zca-rust confined to zalo)
session/ send_sticker reuses the per-account send throttle (ban-risk r1)

command/ send_sticker + search_stickers + recent_stickers + sticker_categories + sticker_category reuse the stored session/store; sticker messages persisted (kind=sticker) so history shows them; sent stickers recorded in a per-account recent-sticker history
store/ recent_stickers table (schema v3) + repositories; pack tabs derived from recently-used categories (Zalo has no owned-packs endpoint)
Composer sticker picker (Gần đây row + per-pack tabs + search grid) sends a sticker; chat pane renders sticker bubbles as images from the allowlisted CDN; incoming stickers render in realtime
nonGoals: A full owned-sticker-store catalog (Zalo exposes no list-owned-packs endpoint; packs are derived from recent usage + search)
Animated sprite playback tuning (static webp render)

acceptance.description: command/ send_sticker + search_stickers compile and reuse the stored session; build passes.
Offline unit tests for the incoming sticker mapping + sticker persistence pass.
Frontend builds with the sticker picker + sticker bubble rendering.
Live: search_sticker returns stickers and a real sticker is delivered (Zalo returns a message id).
